defaults.negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, blurry, distorted, deformed hands, extra limbs, low quality, warped faces, oversaturated, cartoonish

ideas.title: A day in New York City, 2026

scenes.prompt: Aerial sunrise over the Manhattan skyline in 2026, the Hudson and East rivers glinting, One World Trade Center and the Empire State Building catching warm golden light, soft morning haze.
Times Square at its busiest, towering animated LED billboards, yellow cabs and crowds crossing the street, vivid neon reflections on wet pavement, energetic city atmosphere.
Brooklyn Bridge at golden hour with the Manhattan skyline behind, pedestrians and cyclists crossing, sunlight flaring through the steel cables, cinematic shallow depth of field.
Sweeping view of Central Park giving way to the midtown skyline at dusk, city lights switching on across the buildings, twilight sky in deep blue and gold.
